source.description:
IMPORTANT: This package version requires Studio v2020.4 or above. Installing it on versions lower than the recommended ones may cause unexpected behavior.
                Mobile activities which enable users to automate mobile devices running Android or iOS, using a local or remote Appium server. The package includes activities for performing UI operations, pressing hardware buttons, managing applications, capturing device screenshots, retrieving logs, and more.

activities.description: Create finger paths using input points that will be executed on the screen device.
Returns True if an element with specified selector exists in current context and False otherwise.

Executes Appium mobile commands.                                                      
WARNING: Please check the available commands for your Appium version.
Get an attribute of an element
Get the current device orientation
Get logs for a log type
Get all available log types for a session
Install an app using the path of it
Get the selected item(s) from a target element.
Get the system time from a mobile device
Extracts the text from a specified UI element.
Manage an app using a command
Manage other app using commands
Go to a deeplink inside an application
Open a certain URL in the current active web browser.

Swipes to a pre-set screen position, starting from one point to another. 
WARNING: This activity should only be used in scenarios where automating a control using a standard Swipe activity is not possible and where we do not expect to support multiple screen sizes with the same workflow, as coordinates are normally device-specific.
Press a hardware button on the connected device
Set the current device geographic location
Change and get the orientation of the connected device
Set the selected item(s) on a target element.
Set text of a indicated target
Swipe in a mobile application
Get screenshot from a mobile device
Tap a specified UI element.
